This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] #1 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #4 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #5 Test that WebAssembly compilation succeeds (memory_size_import.wast:1)
  assert_true: WebAssembly.compile failed unexpectedly with TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt at {loc} expected true got false
